These people are very knowlegeable and easy to work with.  They kept our yard tidy during the whole process.  I would highly recommend to anyone looking for a fair and honest contractor.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBs8hOOJK4iYZ4wW0HtG8Za&fid=0x0:0x7d50e0524797d530"],"When":"2026-3-3"},{"Name":"Denis Dombrowski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK4y1wns0hs27RY2N-JnkZ0mQlSFesU5pUDYf_53FyxmgpPcQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"28 years ago we had our house roof shingles put on by Crown Roofing, a Vernon Company owned by Randy Todosychuk.  We were extremely pleased with his work.
Now in 2026 we needed to replace our shingles and eavestroughs again.  We started our search for a reputable company to do this and were surprised to find out that Randy was still doing business in Vernon but now it is a family business with Randy as their roofing manager. The name of their company is North OKGN Construction.
Because of our previous experience with Randy we hired them to do our roof and eavestroughs and were not disappointed.  From start to finish the job was done exactly like the contract that we agreed to with Randy overseeing the job. He used 2 excellent roofers doing the work that took 4 days to complete.  Randy was at the jobsite every day making sure it was done correctly.
Thanks for your professionalism.
We highly recommend North OKN Construction for any of your roofing needs.
Denis and Mary Dombrowski, Vernon, B.C.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"James R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIiuO3Zc1b5Qz-f77zo2agQfrnYDVJVP2MA2u0vW8ZIvTx_tg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From quoting to completion, the team were excellent to work with. Really good communications, friendly crew, and efficient work that got our roof sorted sooner than expected with great results - would highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shelagh Bigsby","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIv6_LyqnUYb5TlcJqI51Ot4Z_9mWjCpAhfNvwCuCXliOlWDQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I don't usually do reviews, but was so impressed by North OKGN Construction. They were so fast with their response to my inquiry and then had fantastic communication throughout the whole job. They fit our roof job in even though they were very busy and went above and beyond to get it done. Friendly, professional and we didn't have to lift a finger. Would highly recommend and will definitely use them again if we need any type of service they provide.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"John Willis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9I5LkbGUxyt5Uapjr4rQt_XTzsknJyVFj-iHCdamm6MkqHFHF=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We called and Randy Sr responded, in a big way. The first two are the before and the last are the after shots.  We used this company on the recommendation of our neighbours.
We called Marcel for a quote in January of this year as we were planning extensive renovations to our home that included exterior painting and an updated modern gutter system.
He was replied promptly and discussed the options that were available to replace our existing, old and sad looking leaky gutters.
We accepted his quote and reminded him that we could not give him a specific date as it would have to be in conjunction with our paint contractor and the weather.
He kept in touch with us via email over the several months that followed and when we finally got a date for painting (wet Spring) Avalanche Gutters were able to come in within two days after completion of painting.
The team arrived and set to removing all the old gutter system quickly and carefully, respective of our new paint and plantings.
I noticed they were using hearing protection when using their saws etc.  They also took the time to answer our questions.
They worked efficiently and made sure any debris was cleaned up.
We were very pleased with both the Gentek product and the service we received from the Avalanche Team and would work
with them and/or recommend them to our friends and neighbours.

Janette and Bob Lewis","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICu24HgwQE&fid=0x0:0x576ff2188bf169f9"],"When":"2022-8-7"},{"Name":"David Strahl","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUwnc6-5zj4DRFZO0TZvvyBEdEBciWOr6CYRj1URUY-ICvBAnA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Marcel and his crew are knowledgeable pros who gave great advice and got the job done properly and efficiently.

title: Solar Roofing
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Josh Haymond","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLQfhFF9qWhEwkwoAFrc9yt5Vd4r76xWqgA35FsaFyxA3_K6w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Good day,
As the business owner and operator, I would like to speak out to Kaylea and Eric.

Kaylea, i am aware that we did have a roof leak in the month of June at the Alpine center located on kal lake Rd. It was a very disappointing thing to happen to not only you as a worker in the building but the other business owners aswell as ourselves.   We never do leave anything un-covered as you would say but i can appreciate your frustration in the matter as no one wants to ever have that happen to them.. Im glad we were able to work through it and fix any ceiling tiles that were ruined due to the water entry on the perimeter edge of the building. We also apologize that this has pushed you to a point to give us such a low rating and review, as we were there hand in hand to alleviate the situation the moment we got the call for the roof leak.
If your still left unsatisfied i am very sorry im unable to change that view.
Cheers.

Eric, I am sorry if you feel that our services provided to you were insufficient, as we came to your residence out of town for a repair on a chimney that we had not done previous work on. After Our first repair you stated that it did not fully fix the situation so we sent out another worker free of charge to alleviate the situation.  Months later you requested we came back again, we provided our opinion on the chimney issue and i thought that was the end of it. My apologies if it was not dealt with accordingly as we strive to provide a quality job from our office to on site.
I wish we could have a better understanding as to what we could do or could have done to make you change your mind on your previously poor review.
Cheers.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kaylea Egely","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9tsgTD6mE5RmAaU_B5qTl3CKEJ9UPLy3bpLsJ9JFCJAu8XZMD=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If I could put zero stars I would. They did some work on the building I work in and didn't finish. they also didn't cover the roof with the a tarp and it rained, and now the whole building has leaks...","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Eric Marin-Lamellet","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVHL7pMPiHjuqSJu0cxtZisD5ueuniTrpl2tVtDvZQsBsbiJzzQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joanne Hennigar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV_LMAljN8Y_5thcuwVaV-K695fPfAOk4Mi900lxWU3bxvv0KkA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""}]

Their sales proces, project management, coordination, and quality control were excellent. They were open to making thoughtful changes during construction that improved the final result. Communication was always clear and responsive, and the home was completed on time.

Even after our March 2025 possession, the support has been fantastic. The attention to detail in our home truly exceeded our expectations.

We highly recommend Keith Construction to anyone looking for a quality home builder in the Okanagan.

Thank you!
The Peers Family","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDJn3N87ObWVjJ5ZZzcMxEt&fid=0x0:0xc41101fc8f579f09"],"When":"2025-6-23"},{"Name":"Andre and Lynette de Zwaan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUXN7ZKhHPWvymQwaFPPQ0ZwgCw_xf7_MhAc65pQilTpOxEZYwY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I believe we shared a great review of Keith Construction 5 years ago when our home was first completed.  Since that time we have had an ongoing issue with a flooring manufacturer that would not warranty the cupping laminate installed in the lower level.  the floors need to be replaced so Bryce and Mike at Keith Construction were excellent at coming to the table to help with absorbing the cost and managing the job. we can not say enough good things about Keith construction and welcome anyones questions if they have any doubts about hiring Keith Construction for their build project.
We have found them to be very thorough, and competent to complete all work to a very high standard.  communication has always been excellent and everything always very well organized.  We trust this company and will certainly be looking to them next time we build.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDI6ra95AE&fid=0x0:0xc41101fc8f579f09"],"When":"2025-4-8"},{"Name":"Christine Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKQPP_a9CJ6Vt1-W5lQG39YTyMStY13x-6dmRg0RrRNOZZT5g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a long journey before we finally entrusted Keith Construction with the building of our dream home. From the initial consultation to the final touches, the professionalism throughout the build was first rate and truly exceeded our expectations. Every detail was meticulously handled, and we felt supported and informed every step of the way. We are beyond excited with the results, and it feels surreal to finally see our vision come to life. We can't wait to show our home to our family and friends.  Big thank you to Chris, Jack, Doug and Renee for all their support throughout the process.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCYvJbMdw&fid=0x0:0xc41101fc8f579f09"],"When":"2025-5-2"},{"Name":"Clara Appleby","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKRYrwRsiy3Be658j9WmQZyJqqx8gZ5zVSpoTw8V9wsBF9btA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I talked to several contractors, for the kitchen renovation, the general response was that the project was too small for them to consider.  Bryce from Keith Construction, not only called back, he did a site visit, provided options and guidance before presenting a quote. I cannot say enough good things about everyone at Keith from project manager Tom Saliken, the construction crew and sub-contractors. They were friendly, professional and very respectful. When we needed to get in and out, they always stopped and cleared a path for mom, as she uses a walker and is on oxygen. It was a little hectic as they worked around us but in four weeks, from tear out to painting is done, we had a new kitchen.
I would highly recommend Keith Construction for any renovation project, they are fast, efficient and just nice to deal with.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICX5vCbugE&fid=0x0:0xc41101fc8f579f09"],"When":"2024-10-16"},{"Name":"Kelly Weisner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ7bPHom4q7pxiRJYN3c09DcxSPK1xanttoWih0gReM8j0EIA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We built our retirement home in 2025 at Adventure Bay. After looking at lots and interviewing approved builders, we decided on Keith Construction after seeing the quality of the finished homes they built in the area.

The whole process from start to finish was professional, smooth, on time and on budget. If any of you have built a home before you know how stressful it can be. Keith takes all the stress out of the equation making the whole process  a pleasant and memorable experience.

Chris the Chief Estimator found our dream lot and listened to our wish list, coming up with a budget and healthy allowances that were bang on.

Jack put our house design and ideas on paper. He was so patient and understanding, always willing to change things even when we went full circle a couple of times and ended up where we started.

Renee the project coordinator helped immeasurably with selections and updating the software program Keith uses called “Buildertrend” This App keeps you updated with costs, scheduling and even pictures of every stage during construction.

Doug the Senior Project manager was awesome as he kept on top of all the trades and made sure everything was on time and budget & always offered ideas & supplied input.

The trades Keith uses are excellent and after talking to most of them on site, they enjoy working for them and it shows in the finished product.

All the members of the team helped make this project as stress free as possible and are outstanding in their own ways because of all their experience.

We highly recommend Keith Construction if you are thinking of building here in the Okanagan. Every person that we talked to agrees, they are the best!

Thank you Keith Construction!!

Wendy & Kelly Weisner","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rose Goodall","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK18MPvQRJUzlecUXFkJFV9yaJUMwir7L9hC3WKj0z9NOOAdw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It has been a pleasure working with Keith Construction on building the home of our dreams in the mountains. Even though we reside in Ontario, Keith Construction made each step of the decision making process easy and fluid, with regularly scheduled virtual meetings with their in-house team and our interior designer. We found them to be well-organized, attentive to details, solution-oriented, and quick to address challenges or problems.

Even though it was our home they were building, Keith Construction took the care as if it were their own and we are confident we have a high-quality build. They were efficient and were able to meet a tight build schedule, finishing many months ahead of some of the homes being constructed by other builders in our neighbourhood that started at the same time.

Keith Construction is a lovely, family-owned business and wonderful to work with. We would definitely recommend working with them on a new-home build.

Rose and Darryl Goodall","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDBpM72YQ&fid=0x0:0xc41101fc8f579f09"],"When":"2023-1-11"},{"Name":"Lynda Campbell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVrCosoC_DzggafuW8Q5RI27fbyM9O3bj4eQZgK83iEj2YloEcR=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We built a home in Vernon in 2023 with this fine family owned company. Very easy to recommend Keith Construction and we’re proud to do it!","Images":null,"When":""}]

Because we resided 3 provinces away much of our communication was done through email and we had to trust that the finish product would meet our expectations. The entire office staff worked with us to deliver updates and finalise finishes.

We were provided a very reasonable rate for their labour and supplies. They also provided photos of the work that was done and even fixed up our soffits, temporarily, since they "aren't soffit experts". Would 100% use Trevor @ Roof Rescue again!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jenni Gregg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlSrxqdZ4SKIDHxhxbucsDm6sUAQ9vXmAWagiu2YzAikJXCX9xyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can't recommend Roof Rescue enough!!

After a weekend of heavy rain, I discovered a leak in my roof. The restoration crew couldn’t go up there, so a friend recommended I call Roof Rescue, and I’m so glad I did!

Trevor came by quickly, assessed the damage, and had great solutions ready to go. Within just a couple of hours, my roof was not only fixed, but honestly better than it was before. He explained everything in a clear, down-to-earth way and suggested a few simple ventilation upgrades.

He took plenty of photos to walk me through what he was doing, gave me tips on what to watch for over the next few years, and was just incredibly friendly and easy to work with. I really felt looked after.  And, I swear I could already feel the temperature difference on my upper floor within hours.

Trevor and the team at Roof Rescue are knowledgeable, professional, and genuinely care about the work they do. I highly recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Also on multiple occasions I get charged hundreds of dollars more for construction and demolition rates vs regular refuse. They claim it is because the wood and metal is not separated and tangled together. Obviously if I can save $700 I will spend 10 minutes and separate things on the top. This has happened so often that I started taking pictures to dispute the fees with no such luck. I wish I had other options so regrettably I will still be a loyal customer. I just wish they cared for the customers more than cornering the market. I have posted reviews on facebook groups and they are removed by admins and I am given a facebook warning.

They had done our original roof when we built our house in 2005, and have provided outstanding service since then.  We had some occasional storm damage, and they were quick to respond and repair, even 15 years after the original work.
Pinnacle provided us with a clear quote, with details about options that were available.  When we chose to proceed, they communicated clearly about timelines and expectations.  Their crew was efficient, polite, safety-conscious, and very respectful of us and our property. They left the worksite tidy and clean every day. The work was completed on time and without any inconvenience to us.
Pinnacle did two inspections upon completion, one to ensure everything was completed to specifications and that everything was cleaned up, and a second by a manager came to ensure it was finished professionally.  We were then provided with a final bill which was clear and accurate, with no surprises.

I can not say enough good things about this company!  Their workmanship is top quality, their communication and business practices are excellent, and their staff were a pleasure to have at our home.  This was an absolutely outstanding experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sean Bickert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLgtOp2VouBfv_UmT_qB1HOvFDgkPJysJ3EELc753fowCtvCA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had our roof done by Pinnacle about 15 yrs ago. We refer Pinnacle all the time, and recently they replaced a roof that was done incorrectly by another roofing company that customers of ours had done. The Pinnacle team was even better than when we did our roof. There were visits from the supervisor (and updates + conversations with a roofing inspector to navigate some tricky sections for the best options for longevity) and their own internal safety officer was out to insure the team was working safely.
You cannot go wrong having Pinnacle complete your roof. Clean, courteous, prompt, and genuinely invested in do a great job that you’ll be happy with.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"That Farm","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7RrplvxlVpRHHHMdryDxCohtY7WEYl4ukzsaOqzd8YH_NxFQ3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a leak from moss growth between shingles. title: KC's Contracting & Custom Torchworks
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"J V","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLV8pLthfaYcDNL7w2kYS0R1NVBHzEBlAdGoYlLmhXDHKRTeexD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Without a doubt the best roofing company in the Okanagan. This was my first time hiring a roofing contractor and having heard horror stories from others I knew I had to do my diligence in selecting the right company to do our roof replacement. I set out to get 3 quotes but ended up getting 5 in total, as 2 of the companies that came did not have their own liability insurance (why are you here then?). I am very glad that I happened to ask a good friend of mine if they ever had roof work done, and they suggested KC's Contracting & Custom Torchworks. John stopped by the day after I contacted him and from the first 30 seconds of meeting him I knew he and his company were the ones to do the job. I awarded them the contract as soon as I received the quote. It was still a big leap of faith as this is our first year living in our first home and had to drain the emergency fund to get this done. So when Andrew, Brady and company stopped by at 7am sharp on the day they said they would be here and set to work, I breathed a huge sigh of relief. And they did not disappoint! The work ethic of these guys was nothing short of impressive. They barely stopped from daybreak to dusk, and as I was home for most of the 3 day job I was able to observe their attitude, professionalism and camaraderie as a team throughout the day.  I learned that two of them are also volunteer firefighters so they understand the science of using open flames around combustible materials, which gave me confidence in their skill with the torch-on section of the roof. The job was completed as promised, and everything we could hope to expect: fair price, reasonable timeline, quality workmanship and a clean site to finish.

To summarize, I am a new homeowner and this was my first time hiring a contractor. Getting my roof replaced was a big deal to me. After dealing with KC's Contracting, I would never hire anybody else for this type of job. They gave me the peace of mind I hired them for: a roof over our head. HIGHLY RECOMMENDED. Thank you!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID4tejqIA&fid=0x0:0xff9b784319244691"],"When":"2018-12-8"},{"Name":"Tamilyn Severin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWv4WO2BZ49eYZSwULbKJ2FmK3v79-q7zoqQ_Rjov5DHOtmXHU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Roofing Rules ..
1.Don’t redo your roof yourself EVER unless you are a roofer ..
2.If your hunny won’t listen and breaks rule one and your roof is uninsurable move on to rule 3 ( which doubles as rule #1 )
3. Call John or Andrew at KC Contracting to come fix your mess!!

In this day and age customer service seems to be a luxury, but from the first moment of contact I was super impressed with this company. Even thou our little home is a drop in the bucket for them as they take on huge jobs , John made me feel like it was important and my peace of mind mattered. The quote was not the lowest  but it was the most professional,inclusive of what I asked for and truly wasn’t that far off the others I gathered.

I also talked to other roofers who’s recommendation of KC stood out as the pitch of my roof is ridiculously low That coupled with their BB rating and previous reviews from customers made up my mind. The decision made I contacted John who promptly put me me in to their busy schedule and assured me all would be well. He was right.

When Andrew showed up to assess and drop the dump trailer off his friendly personable knowledgeable manner set me immediately at ease and I knew I was in good hands & I boy was I right. He & his FANTASTIC courteous crew rocked the roof and by time I got home  they were done .. 😁👌🏼 Including cleaning even checked my driveway and area for wayward roofing nails .

Just awaiting the sub-contractor to complete the soffits and eavesthroughing & this roofing nightmare will finally be behind us once and for all THANK YOU JOHN , ANDREW & KC Crew .. you get 5 stars from us all day long 😉","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDE_4uXSg&fid=0x0:0xff9b784319244691"],"When":"2019-3-31"},{"Name":"Derrick Kish","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI5gMENgJI6fwIiutNtQrCRU5fm_mLZkVXv0TpebrsWhgbZLg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic service.  We had a roofer a C edited in to do work who went MIA. Called these guys up and they were on site in less then 3 hours to torch on a curb. Highly recommend them. Employees (Seth and Max) that showed up to do the work were extremely polite, friendly, knowledgeable and efficient. They will now be my go to company. Thanks a ton for your work and customer service.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dave Gast","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK64HsxJ7YwxadHcObn-d00ghg3TNEuq_If0pEAQSust1RIiQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Five star all the way!!!

By far, the best roofing company in Kelowna. I was in a major jam and within two hours this company had started work. Andrew stepped up big from the  beginning to the end. I would highly recommend Andrew and his team to anyone that needs their roof Fixed. As long as I live in Kelowna KC’s contracting will be my go to roofers. 100%. Thank you so much!!!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Doug Cook","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIAd30HmjVAJQ8suUMjx7o7Cf_urtA_Vdx3VpFjxSBSVNGDQg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had Andrew and his team to our property to install a new roof. Andrew came up and gave us a quote and explained the entire process to us. They showed up on time and ready to work. The team was experienced and very professional.

Originally, we were told the roof would take a day and a half, but the team hunkered down and got it done in a day. And they were clean!!

I would highly recommend KC's Contracting!!

Thank you again to Andrew and his team for a job well done!!

Doug
Joe Rich (Kelowna)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Adria August","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV78oGWJnPMsQ6qLttytoxkHaL6uFhpcGwkcQYHxYsdwNtIGTUi=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Being in the construction industry I have connected with may trades over the years however Andrew and his crew at KC Contracting stood out as one of the best I have worked with. They crew was respectful and professional, the schedule and budget remained as promised and the final project (a substantial torch on roof project) was flawless. I asked him to give me a quote on replacing the skylight as well as repairing the one I have.  When I received both quotes I decided to go with a new skylight.  When the job was completed, I noticed that all the cardboard and garbage from the job was gone.  He also checked out the rest of my roof and said that it looked good.  I found that dealing with Archer Roofing was a great experience.  Pawel is very pleasant, polite and very knowledgable at his job. We have a slope at the end of our yard that is otherwise unusable space, so we asked Roost to install a ground mount system there. They designed and built a 10.9 kW system for us and it looks great.  We continue to be very happy Roost customers and highly recommend them.

Update for 2020: We just had Roost add 14 more panels to the existing system. And as with our previous install, Roost once again did a great job. Highly recommended!

June 2016:
We recently had a solar system installed on my home by the pros at Roost Energy. Steve worked within our budget to identify the ideal size of the system for our home. The Roost team showed up on time and were friendly, professional and they really know their stuff. I highly recommend them.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDCvLe9zAE&fid=0x0:0x8fea49ae05d9972c"],"When":"2020-9-18"},{"Name":"Mark Yager","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWIcwDDsF4zRhpB84-Vhr24Z8uljPh9IjNQ4VCJpmYGarikwwP2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were extremely impressed with the entire experience with Roost.  Their proposal was clear and easy to understand, they were very patient with our numerous questions, and managed to get the system installed within a couple months of our final approval.

Installation of our 10kw system occurred over 3 days.  The crew was very polite and professional.  They worked safely and efficiently but didn't mind answering questions while they worked.  They kept their work area clean and tidy, and cleaned up at the end of each day.

I was very impressed that the electrical installer took a few extra minutes to orient the wiring in a manner that took him longer but resulted in a much nicer finished result.

Even after paying the invoice the team continued to assist with the final setup with BCHydro net metering program, the monitoring system, etc.

Overall the experience was excellent.  I simply cannot think of anything that could have been done better.  While not the cheapest quote we received, I am confident that the extra expense was well worth it given the 25+ years that the system will be in/on our house.

Edit April 2025;  We had Roost back to do another system (14kW) on our new shop. Our experience with them was as good as our first one!  They installed the entire system in 2 days, and all wiring was done safely and neatly.  Again, they assisted with BCHydro paperwork as well as paperwork for government grants.  Another 5-star review from us !","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICO-v79PQ&fid=0x0:0x8fea49ae05d9972c"],"When":"2022-6-8"},{"Name":"Chris Caswell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUW5h5OKn6mhZndGS9ZHkfh0cqXKkyJVgQGRYbH5DndB3Vjv4fvBQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Its been 2 years since I had Roost Solar come out and install our system! One of the best decisions I ever made. They worked with me to build a system for me, and all I want to do is it make it a bigger system and when I do I will be calling Roost Solar?","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDJoNOD3AE&fid=0x0:0x8fea49ae05d9972c"],"When":"2023-7-8"},{"Name":"Ryan Gibb","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKn_U6HdPG-sPVVDq7cDnlDZYiR1bNTkIqiISlL26yRI_qJ6g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic experience with Roost Solar from planning to implementation of our system. Steve, Kelly and the whole team were responsive, informative and all around a pleasure to deal with. James, our installer did a fantastic job and answered any questions I had and did a beautiful job with the install. Our system is 9.72 kw and I wasn't offered any unnecessary upgrades and was in fact dissuaded from increasing the size of our inverter unnecessarily (and thus wasting my own money) because it wouldn't have been worthwhile for the small amount of clipping (where panels are producing more than the inverter can handle) we experience. I feel confident recommending solar to any of my friends and family and will continue to pass along Roost's information to anyone who asks me about solar. I spoke with several of the local companies before choosing Roost and I felt they were the most responsive and competent of those I considered.

Thanks again! We are very happy with the work you did on our home.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDO6K3DOQ&fid=0x0:0x8fea49ae05d9972c"],"When":"2022-6-26"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"dustin sales","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXfbW52spUsZWnwrydb3y0bqs89jjrO8i5Dennj55JMuJW1l84=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I would highly recommend John. He provided me with a detailed quote and sketch of our roof explaining the scope of work. He and his wife were very respectful of our property cleaning up every night. John completed the job on time and his attention to detail was evident.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chris Walz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIyM2EDoo2LPN8pyMXNOTOJFrLQx99q-7IS2iW8Kt_5Is9HWg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently had a roof and deck replaced for my senior mother. Most of the arrangements we had to make from out of province which can be stressful. John and Richelle made the whole process from choosing design options and materials, to quotes and final completion very easy. John even sent us regular progress pictures.
The entire team provided excellent service and every courtesy to my mother throughout the project. We felt their pricing was very competitive and we were truly surprised and delighted with ALL the special touches that were incorporated along the way. Unit Roofing & Exteriors (J&R) really took the time to listen to what we wanted and went Above and Beyond.
We can't thank them enough and are absolutely thrilled with the final product !!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"steve ingram","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKZH7mcCXfd6I22Tr3dyNAnVTgqEq1pDYA6x1wOePaX5gxlkg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just wanted to extend a great thank you to John and his wife for my family's recent home renovation, one of many more to come with John. I trusted John so far, with "tuning-up" my roof and the results make me beieve that there is at least one honest company owner out there in the Okanagan Valley that truly cares about the work they do.  My next project will be my deck, and I will trust no one other than John to do this job.  John does the research for you in whatever project you put in front of him, he will explain it in detail, diagram it if needed, offer options if required, and tell you whether he can or cannot do it within my given timeline.
He is on time, works with his original quote with no "hidden fees", only does the work that makes sense, and cleans as he goes.
John is respectful and polite to me and my family, as he worked at my residence, engaging with my family, while I was at my work.

I could say more, but the experience speaks volumes in and of itself.

All the best John,

Very Happy & Satisfied Home-owner Steve","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sheila S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIIEYRprEqpCAwvMFXNlGRr6_c1H84c5917mhD3dL_tigwnOA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I did my extensive research as there are so many con artists out there or people who supply poor workmanship. Too often they give you a price but that soon changes once they start the job. I own a number of properties and won't go anywhere else after dealing with Unit Roofing. They saved me thousands of dollars with superior workmanship, communication and knowledge. They are well spoken, intelligent and professional. They went well beyond the expected with extras. We went to one of their sites to check their work first, so I don't have any issue with anyone driving by the property where they did the roof and facia on. 784 Burne Ave. I know you will be impressed as well. The larger companies often contract out their work to others or are too busy to do a good job. You won't find that here. Only excellence. Not for one second will you feel like a number. My tenants loved them as well. They truly do care and take such pride in their work.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"shelora sheldan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXUyL6JQww46fMTqVHkLQLh8gnQffmc9U5WLYmR0u1GUWR4j8OX=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Buyer Beware!!! Needing to replace the roof of our flat-top house in Penticton, we received a glowing review of Unit Roofing from a neighbour who had hired John and his partner Richelle to do the replacement roof on their flat-roof house, using Malarkey Omni Seal roofing. And his online reviews were all five stars – praising his communication, hard work, and honesty. So we felt confident proceeding with the project. What transpired from day one was the opposite! In fact this has turned into a nightmare.

While all the other reviews praised John's swift communication, we cannot say enough about the sorry lack of proper and professional communication from him. Once he had our down payment, things went downhill from there. Little to no communication started on the day he was to show up  for the job. We couldn’t get a confirmation from him. For example, his phone’s mailbox was full and there was no response from repeated emails and texts. When he finally responded, he said he would be showing up the first day at 8 AM. 9 AM came around. Then 10 AM. Then 10:30. He showed up closer to 11.

What was promised to be a two day job – with a half third day to tie up loose ends – turned into a four day job. And it’s still unfinished. Promises are at the heart of this deplorable experience. Be aware that John Fitzgerald over-promises and under-delivers! Two examples: a promotional solar vent from his rep was promised but suddenly not available, and his “gutter guy that can do the a solid length of replacement gutter” also never materialized. But so much worse is that John never showed up to put the finishing touches on our new roof. He promised to show up two days after ‘completion’ to do the finishing touches last Thursday, but an email explaining another fiasco at another job – he seems to be plagued with tragedies – he wanted to show up late on the Friday, or giving us a choice, he could come by on the Saturday to “ .... We agreed on Saturday.
Saturday rolled along. We waited all day. He never showed. We couldn’t get a hold of him: mailbox full, no response to emails, no response to texts.

To add insult to injury, what has transpired during this frustrating time was rain. The rain showed pooling along the edge of the back roof slope. The pooling has been caused by the fact that existing flashing from the previous tar-and-gravel roofing was not removed and was creating a dam, retaining water from flowing over into the gutter. Worse, at each corner end, rainwater drips behind the flashing/gutter! My husband had brought this possibility up to John during the roofing job, but John passed it off, saying that the water will flow over the edge into the gutter (wrong!)
We unwisely paid the balance of the payment the day he was finishing up, with his promise to return in two days to tie ends up: heat torch any unsealed edges, caulk flashing, etc. He never showed. Frustrating!

After contacting his partner, Richelle (Office Manager), and John’s mother, who lives in Penticton and had visited the job site several times, he contacted us via text with an angry note, claiming out of the blue that we had already received a $2750 discount and that we would have to pay for any further work. (WHAT? AT NO POINT WAS THERE ANY DISCOUNT DISCUSSED!) And claiming that we were unprofessional in trying to contact him through others. He stated he would show up Sunday (yesterday) at 1 PM. No show. No email, no text, no phone call. No response.

We are sick to our stomachs and completely frustrated that we are now left with an unfinished job, no recourse for compensation and a roof that in all likelihood will have to be repaired. The professionalism that others have experienced with Unit Roofing seems to have withered away.
We have now called another company to help us through this mess!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kelly Rae Stobert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKAPnBqjIwcBL6y0OOM5r0Eb_IFVUAJKED_wQeQFmEwkifuDA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cannot recommend them enough! Will never use anyone else again. Just excellent! Thanks","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Richard Ivan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX8Bs-gNZiBONXHuMeZYigJaeUEO7I3_Qp8bvPRkBvga_F_8fNVzg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The install of our moon tunnel was carried out professionally and we are very happy with the result! He promptly provided a comprehensive quote, addressing our additional needs; exhaust vent, and carport re-roof as well.

Chance and his crew were highly recommended by a family friend who is also in the roofing business.
